---
title: "Tier 7 — Masters Specialisation Tracks"
subtitle: "Six parallel tracks · planned, not yet built"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This tier is **planned but not yet authored.** See [`_curriculum.yml`](/_curriculum.yml)
for the topic plan and the [Home page](/index.qmd) for build status.
:::

## Planned tracks

Six parallel specialisation tracks, each branching from Tier 6:

- **Research** — measure theory, functional analysis, topology.
- **AI / ML** — statistical learning theory, manifold methods, RL theory.
- **Game Development** — differential geometry, quaternions, computational
  geometry.
- **Databases** — relational algebra, query optimisation, set-theoretic
  foundations.
- **Systems** — queueing theory, performance modelling, formal methods.
- **Encryption** — algebraic number theory, elliptic curves, lattice-based
  cryptography.

[← Back to Home](/index.qmd)
